one_time_description: Drinking water settlement received during fiscal year 2023
economic_notes: Nation acquired 100% of B.C. Cattle Co. Limited on December 16, 2022 for $2,050,000 funded by Province of BC for food sovereignty purposes. Nation has investments in SXD Limited Partnership (99.99%), Stemt' Emalt Limited Partnership (99.99%), and SXDC Ltd. through modified equity method.
notes: Audit is qualified for three reasons: (1) no PS 3280 Asset Retirement Obligation assessment completed; (2) no approved budget presented in statements; (3) inability to verify existence, completeness and valuation of inventory and tangible capital assets related to B.C. Cattle Co. Limited acquisition. Nation consolidated B.C. Cattle Co. Limited mid-year (acquired Dec 16, 2022) after determining it could not self-sustain. Three GBEs accounted for by modified equity: SXD Limited Partnership, Stemt' Emalt Limited Partnership, and SXDC Ltd. Four entities fully consolidated: Housing Program, Health Program, Treaty Program, Store, plus Stswecem'c Xget'tem Limited Partnership, GP Ltd., Stemt' Emalt GP Ltd., and B.C. Cattle Co. Limited. Balance sheet details (current liabilities, deferred revenue, long-term debt, tangible capital assets net book value) not fully extracted from available text. total_government_transfers calculated as ISC + Province of BC + CMHC + DFO + FNHA + FNESC + CCATEC = 5,236,189 + 4,959,291 + 660,038 + 434,535 + 195,826 + 393,494 + 75,500 - noting Three Corners Health Services Society and Northern Shuswap Tribal Society may be intergovernmental transfers as well.
